reason:
Agent failed to retrieve and report GitHub username due to authentication error (401 "Bad credentials") when calling GitHub API, followed by Claude API capacity issue (529 errors).
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub API authentication failed with 401 "Bad credentials" error. Despite successfully granting GitHub account access through the connected account card, the agent's attempt to call the GitHub API returned: {"message":"Bad credentials","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest","status":"401"}. This prevented the agent from retrieving the user's GitHub username.
    - Claude API capacity issue prevented agent from generating final response. After encountering the GitHub API authentication error, the agent attempted multiple diagnostics (bash commands to inspect response, check environment variables, get headers) but then encountered an "LLM Provider Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors. The API is at capacity".
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home with sidebar containing three agents including "QA-20260508-170004-amyk".
Step 2 - Found and clicked "QA-20260508-170004-amyk" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened successfully with the agent name and controls visible.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle" which meets the requirement.

Step 4 - Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was successfully sent and a new session "GitHub Username Verification Check" was created with "working" status.
Step 5a - Waited for account access request card and it appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up your username?" — Card displayed with GitHub account already selected (checked checkbox).
Step 5b - Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Button was clicked and access was granted successfully.
Step 6a - Waited for agent response and agent made API calls to GitHub — Agent attempted to fetch GitHub user info via proxy but received 401 "Bad credentials" error from GitHub API.

Step 6b - Additional permission request appeared asking "Allow get the authenticated user?" with "github GET /user" — Another permission dialog appeared and "Always allow read:user" scope was selected.

Step 6c - Agent continued working, attempting multiple bash diagnostic commands — Agent executed: "Fetch GitHub user info via proxy" (returned None), "Inspect raw GitHub user response" (returned 401 Bad credentials), "Check proxy-related environment variables", and "Get full headers from proxy response".

Step 7 - Agent finished with "LLM Provider Error" message — After 1m 55s of work, agent encountered "API Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors. The API is at capacity" and could not generate final response with GitHub username. Response does NOT include a GitHub username due to failed authentication and API errors.
bugs: GitHub API authentication failed with 401 "Bad credentials" error. Despite successfully granting GitHub account access through the connected account card, the agent's attempt to call the GitHub API returned: {"message":"Bad credentials","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest","status":"401"}. This prevented the agent from retrieving the user's GitHub username.

Claude API capacity issue prevented agent from generating final response. After encountering the GitHub API authentication error, the agent attempted multiple diagnostics (bash commands to inspect response, check environment variables, get headers) but then encountered an "LLM Provider Error: Repeated 529 Overloaded errors. The API is at capacity".
